title: Architecture of the LLM-Assisted ESG Disclosure Assessment Framework for Taiwan Firms
caption: This diagram illustrates the overall workflow and technical architecture of the proposed framework, including data ingestion of Taiwan-listed company ESG disclosures, LLM fine-tuning tailored to regulatory and linguistic nuances, ESG scoring modules, and interpretability components providing case-level explanations.
data_source: Own design based on methodology section
notes: Use clear modular blocks connected by directional arrows showing data flow. Include components: data input, preprocessing, LLM fine-tuning, ESG scoring algorithm, interpretability/explanation module, and output. Color-code modules by function for clarity.

title: Comparison of ESG Scoring Accuracy and Consistency: LLM vs. Manual and Rule-based Methods
caption: Bar charts compare precision, recall, F1 score, and inter-rater agreement (Cohen’s Kappa) metrics for LLM-assisted ESG scoring against manual and rule-based approaches based on the evaluation dataset of Taiwan ESG disclosures.
data_source: Experimental results from evaluation dataset (Taiwan ESG disclosures)

axes.y: Performance Metrics (Precision, Recall, F1, Cohen’s Kappa)

notes: Grouped bar chart format, separate groups per metric. Use distinct colors for each method. Display error bars if statistical significance available. Include legend and numeric values on bars for clarity.

title: Interpretability Examples of LLM-Generated ESG Scores on Sample Disclosures
caption: Visualizations of interpretability outputs displaying attention heatmaps and scoring rationales generated by the LLM for selected Taiwan-listed company ESG disclosure excerpts, illustrating transparency into model scoring decisions.
data_source: Sample ESG disclosures with LLM attention and explanation outputs
notes: Use color gradients to indicate attention intensity or explanation relevance over text segments. Include example annotations explaining highlighted areas. Possibly present multiple heatmaps for different ESG dimensions or disclosure samples side-by-side.
